title: Abdullah II of Jordan becomes King of Jordan
fact: Abdullah II is the King of Jordan, having ascended the throne on 7 February 1999.

title: Hussein I of Jordan becomes King of Jordan
fact: Hussein bin Talal al-Hashimi was King of Jordan from 1952 until his death in 1999.

title: Abdullah I of Jordan becomes King of Jordan
fact: Abdullah I was the ruler of Jordan from 11 April 1921 until his assassination in 1951.

title: Talal I of Jordan becomes King of Jordan
fact: Talal bin Abdullah al-Hashimi was King of Jordan from the assassination of his father King Abdullah I in 1951, until his forced abdication in 1952.
